body: [{"ac":1,"text":"internal/harnesses/harnesstest package exports RunHarnessConformance, RunQuotaHarnessConformance, RunAccountHarnessConformance, RunModelDiscoveryHarnessConformance","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"Synthetic constructors NewSyntheticQuotaHarness, NewSyntheticAccountHarness, NewSyntheticModelDiscoveryHarness accept Supported* values as parameters","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"Conformance suite asserts emitted Windows[].LimitID is a subset of SupportedLimitIDs(); asserts ResolveModelAlias covers SupportedAliases() positive path and rejects out-of-set with ErrAliasNotResolvable","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"Suite asserts contract shape of single-flight (no error, consistent post-state on concurrent RefreshQuota), not exact probe count","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"Smoke test runs synthetic harnesses against the conformance suite and passes","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
